description: Tiny offline water fixture for the v0.2 golden-output test. Geometry is in WGS84 (EPSG:4326) lon/lat, inside the bbox declared in ../tiny_bbox.json. Provenance: hand-crafted, not derived from a live OSM extract. The geometry exercises the polygon-rasterise and waterway-buffer paths; coastlines are tested separately in tests/infrastructure/test_coastline_reconstruction.py.
